easy.title: Second Largest Number
easy.description: Write `second_largest(nums)` returning second highest distinct number.

medium.title: Rotate List K Steps
medium.description: Rotate list right by K steps in O(N) time.
medium.solution:
def rotate_list(nums, k):
    if not nums: return []
    k = k % len(nums)
    return nums[-k:] + nums[:-k]

hard.title: Merge Intervals
hard.description: Given list of overlapping intervals `[[1,3],[2,6],[8,10]]`, merge overlapping ranges.
hints: Sort intervals by start time first

debugging.title: Fix In-Place Assignment Bug
debugging.description: Fix function setting list to None.
bugs: `nums.sort()` returns None. Use `sorted(nums)` to return new sorted list.
